prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 4209→5728→18766→9206→7648，波动剧烈；2023 年因断档跌至 18766 名，2024 年回升至 9206 名，2025 年进一步回升至 7648 名，近两年呈明显回升趋势，2025 年基准约 7648 名；本省物理类/理科计划 2021–2025 年分别为 25→27→26→21→22 人，2026 年计划 23 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 1 人，扩招幅度约 4.5%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 82 名，近年排名稳定在 82–84 名区间，学校综合实力较强；2025 年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评 A++ 等级），2026 年声誉偏负面（涉及宿舍火灾等校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第 11 位，评价为「高热」，短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；新闻传播学 A+（全国顶尖），与该校传媒特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该 校物理类招生专业（数字媒体技术、通信工程、电子信息工程等）高度契合；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 110868 人，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算，物理类考生约 79980 人，较 2025 年（80421 人）略降约 0.5%，竞争基本持平；学校位于北京，对吉林省考生具有较强跨省吸引力；该校在吉林省招生计划占比较小，属典型的外省优质生源引进模式。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 7648 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招 4.5%、本省物理类考生略降、学校抖音高热但声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 7648 名基础上小幅后移（竞争略缓解），预测最低位次约 7887 名，区间 7387–8387 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 4209→5728→18766→9206→7648, with drastic fluctuations; in 2023, due to a gap, it dropped to 18766, rebounded to 9206 in 2024, and further rebounded to 7648 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 7648 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category/Science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 25→27→26→21→22 students respectively, with a plan of 23 students for 2026, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 4.5%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking range of 82–84 in recent years, indicating strong overall strength; reputation in 2025 was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++ level), while in 2026 it was relatively negative (involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires); ranked 11th in Douyin popularity, evaluated as 'high heat', with large exposure on short video platforms and high attention for applications; Journalism and Communication A+ (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's media characteristics, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, highly matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Digital Media Technology, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.); the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 110,868, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 72% in recent years, resulting in about 79,980 Physics Category examinees, a slight decrease of about 0.5% compared to 2025 (80,421), with competition basically flat; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Jilin Province examinees; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province accounts for a relatively small proportion, typical of a model for introducing high-quality students from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7648, a slight expansion of 4.5% in the 2026 plan, a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category examinees in the province, high Douyin heat but negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (competition slightly eases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 7887, in the range of 7387–8387.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7387), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category/Liberal Arts fluctuated significantly: 528 → 2594 → 1249 → 1447 → 1249. In 2022, it dropped to 2594 due to a gap, rebounded to 1249 in 2023, slightly shifted to 1447 in 2024, and returned to 1249 in 2025. In the past three years, it has stabilized within the 1200–1450 range, with a baseline of approximately 1249 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category/Liberal Arts from 2021 to 2025 was 11 → 11 → 13 → 10 → 11 students, and the 2026 plan is 13 students, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, representing an expansion of about 18.2%, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years and strong overall strength. In 2025, reputation was positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++), but in 2026, reputation turned negative (involving campus safety incidents like dormitory fires). Douyin popularity ranking is 11th, rated as 'high heat,' indicating high application attention. Journalism and Communication is A+ (top nationally), highly matching the university's History Category majors (Communication, Advertising, Journalism, etc.), with strong disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors has been evaluated as 'clearly discouraged' since 2023, but as a top institution in this field, Communication University of China's disciplinary advantage can partially offset negative industry sentiment. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 110,868. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 28%, the estimated number of History Category examinees is about 30,888, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 2025 (31,071), indicating roughly stable competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Jilin Province students. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province is relatively small, typical of a model attracting high-quality students from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1249, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.2%, a slight decrease in provincial History Category examinees, high Douyin heat but negative reputation, and top-tier Journalism and Communication discipline but cooling industry popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly improve (competition slightly intensifies) from the 1249 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1355, with a range of 1005–1705.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<1005), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
